code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_word = false
  mut longest = ""
  mut longest_len = 0

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_word
        let word = string.substring(line, start, i)
        let wlen = i - start
        if wlen > longest_len
          longest = word
          longest_len = wlen
        end
        in_word = false
      end
    else
      if not in_word
        start = i
        in_word = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_word
    let word = string.substring(line, start, n)
    let wlen = n - start
    if wlen > longest_len
      longest = word
      longest_len = wlen
    end
  end

  println("longest=#{longest}")
end
